summary.preferred_next_step: Replace procedural fallbacks with curated GLB assets for allowed and conditional candidates only.

allowed_assets.label: Soft full-height drapes
allowed_assets.placement_rule: inside face of target glazed wall, rail above opening, fabric clears walking path
reasons: Asset is compatible with current opening and constraint assumptions.

allowed_assets.label: Vertical blinds
allowed_assets.placement_rule: interior track above full-height opening; slats stack to non-passage side
reasons: Asset is compatible with current opening and constraint assumptions.

conditional_assets.label: Split roller shade
conditional_assets.placement_rule: split panels over wide opening; leave door operation clear
reasons: Sliding/balcony door operation must stay clear; place asset beside the active passage, not in front of it.

conditional_assets.label: Mixed indoor plant cluster
conditional_assets.placement_rule: interior daylight corner beside target opening; preserve circulation and door operation; visual/wellbeing support only, not primary air purification
conditional_assets.care_profile: mixed low-to-medium maintenance; avoid overwatering and low-daylight corners
reasons: Maintain a clear circulation strip; use compact/side placement only.
North-facing daylight may be limited; choose shade-tolerant species or preserved greenery.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.

conditional_assets.label: Daylight planter shelf
conditional_assets.placement_rule: low shelf on the interior side of the glazed wall, shifted away from the active door path and kept below the handle zone
reasons: Sliding/balcony door operation must stay clear; place asset beside the active passage, not in front of it.
Maintain a clear circulation strip; use compact/side placement only.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.

conditional_assets.label: Hanging planter rail
conditional_assets.placement_rule: interior rail above or beside the opening; suspend small planters outside the walking/door operation path with waterproof drip trays
reasons: Ceiling or rail fixing should be renter-safe or user-confirmed before use.
Sliding/balcony door operation must stay clear; place asset beside the active passage, not in front of it.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.

conditional_assets.label: Vertical plant ladder
conditional_assets.placement_rule: freestanding ladder shelf in daylight corner; must not overlap window/door opening, egress, or circulation strip
reasons: Maintain a clear circulation strip; use compact/side placement only.
North-facing daylight may be limited; choose shade-tolerant species or preserved greenery.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.

conditional_assets.label: Interior trellis climber screen
conditional_assets.placement_rule: slim trellis panel beside, not in front of, the active glazed opening; requires pruning and daylight
reasons: Sliding/balcony door operation must stay clear; place asset beside the active passage, not in front of it.
North-facing daylight may be limited; choose shade-tolerant species or preserved greenery.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.

blocked_assets.label: Venetian blind
reasons: Asset is explicitly avoided for sliding_glass_door.

blocked_assets.label: Adjustable external louver
blocked_assets.placement_rule: outside target external wall, offset from glazing, do not intersect door swing or balcony path
reasons: Facade-mounted asset requires owner/building approval.

blocked_assets.label: Fabric awning
blocked_assets.placement_rule: outside and above opening, sized by glazing width plus side allowance
reasons: Facade-mounted asset requires owner/building approval.

blocked_assets.label: Balcony planter shade
blocked_assets.placement_rule: outside balcony zone only, not on shared facade without approval
reasons: Biophilic exterior asset requires balcony or outdoor maintenance access.
Biophilic assets support comfort perception and nature connection; they are not counted as the primary air-quality or thermal-control system.
